title: devtunnel.exe
html:
devtunnel.exe

Binary to enable forwarded ports on windows operating systems.

Download

Download Files, Upload Files, Data Exfiltration

devtunnel.exe host -p 8080

Enabling a forwarded port for locally hosted service at port 8080 to be exposed on the internet. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User
